MERLIN PENTAGON: a relevant Vitan reference for your flexible workspace portfolio

Hi Umesh,

For operators serving enterprise users, the real design gap is usually not more square footage. It is whether the client-facing zones signal the same confidence as the growth ambition behind the center.

I’m sharing MERLIN PENTAGON as a corporate-scale reference that helps illustrate business-ready environments and strong architectural expression without generic fit-out language.

Project Snapshot
Location: Kolkata, West Bengal
Type: Commercial
Why it fits: Strong relevance for DevX's flexible workspace direction.
